purpose.summary: This COBOL program schedules a PSB (Program Specification Block) for IMS database interaction. It attempts to schedule the PSB and handles potential errors by setting an error flag, constructing an error message, and displaying it on the PAULST screen.
purpose.business_context: This program is likely part of an IMS-based application, responsible for initiating database access.

called_programs.purpose: Displays an error message on the PAULST screen.

paragraphs.purpose: The SCHEDULE-PSB paragraph is responsible for scheduling a Program Specification Block (PSB) within an IMS environment. It first attempts to schedule the PSB using the `EXEC DLI SCHD` command, specifying the PSB name and disabling Dhabend abend processing (lines 3-6). The DIBSTAT value is moved to IMS-RETURN-CODE for checking the status of the scheduling. If the PSB has been scheduled more than once (PSB-SCHEDULED-MORE-THAN-ONCE), it terminates the current PSB and schedules it again (lines 8-17). If the scheduling is successful (STATUS-OK), the IMS-PSB-SCHD flag is set to TRUE (lines 18-19). If the scheduling fails, an error flag (WS-ERR-FLG) is set to 'Y', an error message is constructed including the IMS-RETURN-CODE, and the message is stored in WS-MESSAGE (lines 21-28). Finally, it moves -1 to ACCTIDL of COPAU0AI and calls the SEND-PAULST-SCREEN program to display the error message (lines 29-30).

error_handling.action: Sets WS-ERR-FLG to 'Y', constructs an error message in WS-MESSAGE, moves -1 to ACCTIDL of COPAU0AI, and calls SEND-PAULST-SCREEN.

open_questions.question: What is the structure and purpose of the PAULST screen?
open_questions.context: The program calls SEND-PAULST-SCREEN to display an error, but the details of this screen are not available.
open_questions.suggestion: Examine the definition of SEND-PAULST-SCREEN and related BMS map definitions.

open_questions.question: What is the purpose of setting ACCTIDL of COPAU0AI to -1?
open_questions.context: The code moves -1 to ACCTIDL of COPAU0AI when an error occurs, but the significance of this action is unclear without knowing the structure and usage of COPAU0AI.
open_questions.suggestion: Examine the copybook definition of COPAU0AI and its usage in other parts of the application.

open_questions.question: What are the possible values of DIBSTAT and their meanings?
open_questions.context: The program checks DIBSTAT after scheduling the PSB, but the specific error codes and their implications are not documented in this snippet.
open_questions.suggestion: Consult the IMS documentation for DIBSTAT values.
